title.en: China-to-Bahamas Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入巴哈马：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入巴哈馬：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Bahamas BBSQ standards context, URCA electricity-sector oversight, Bahamas Power and Light interconnection practice, IEC 62109 safety baseline, likely IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 Americas grid-interconnection direction, EMC expectations, and the Bahamas 120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA-style grid — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与巴哈马BBSQ标准体系背景、URCA电力行业监管、Bahamas Power and Light并网实践、IEC 62109安全基准、可能采用的IEEE 1547和UL 1741美洲并网方向、EMC期望，以及巴哈马120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA体系电网——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與巴哈馬BBSQ標準體系背景、URCA電力行業監管、Bahamas Power and Light併網實務、IEC 62109安全基準、可能採用的IEEE 1547和UL 1741美洲併網方向、EMC期望，以及巴哈馬120/240 V 60 Hz NEMA體系電網——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BBSQ standards determination, URCA licence or regulatory decision, Bahamas Power and Light interconnection approval, customs determination, hurricane-resilience engineering assessment, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bahamas standards, URCA electricity-sector requirements, BPL interconnection rules, local electrical code practice, project-owner requirements, and island-specific hurricane and corrosion exposure requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BBSQ标准范围裁定、URCA许可或监管决定、Bahamas Power and Light并网批准、海关裁定、飓风韧性工程评估或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验巴哈马现行标准、URCA电力行业要求、BPL并网规则、当地电气规范实践、项目业主要求，以及岛屿环境下的飓风和腐蚀暴露要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BBSQ標準範圍裁定、URCA許可或監管決定、Bahamas Power and Light併網批准、海關裁定、颶風韌性工程評估或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗巴哈馬現行標準、URCA電力行業要求、BPL併網規則、當地電氣規範實務、項目業主要求，以及島嶼環境下的颶風和腐蝕暴露要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to The Bahamas, the key practical gap is the 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid. Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is typically validated for China 220/380 V, 50 Hz conditions and does not by itself demonstrate Bahamas grid compatibility. Exporters should plan for 60 Hz firmware, anti-islanding, ride-through, reconnection, protection-threshold, and harmonic revalidation, likely against IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 Americas-style interconnection expectations rather than EN 50549/VDE framing. IEC 62109 safety evidence remains a useful baseline, while BBSQ, URCA, BPL, project owner, and insurer requirements should be confirmed for each project.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口巴哈马时，核心实际差距是60 Hz、120/240 V电网。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据通常基于中国220/380 V、50 Hz条件验证，不能单独证明适配巴哈马电网。出口商应按60 Hz重新验证固件、防孤岛、低/高电压穿越、重连、保护阈值和谐波，且并网方向更可能参考IEEE 1547和UL 1741等美洲体系，而非EN 50549/VDE框架。IEC 62109安全证据仍是有用基准，但每个项目均应核实BBSQ、URCA、BPL、项目业主和保险方要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口巴哈馬時，核心實際差距是60 Hz、120/240 V電網。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據通常基於中國220/380 V、50 Hz條件驗證，不能單獨證明適配巴哈馬電網。出口商應按60 Hz重新驗證韌體、防孤島、低/高電壓穿越、重連、保護閾值和諧波，且併網方向更可能參考IEEE 1547和UL 1741等美洲體系，而非EN 50549/VDE框架。IEC 62109安全證據仍是有用基準，但每個項目均應核實BBSQ、URCA、BPL、項目業主和保險方要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
